summary: Draft, closed-unmerged PR for mnName decomp work. It adds multiple implementations in src/melee/mn/mnname.c, updates mnname and related prototypes, and adds includes needed by the new code. Bot evidence reports 3 newly matched mnname functions and 9 unmatched-function score improvements.

key_files.role: Primary decomp work: replaces placeholders with implementations for mnName_8023749C, CreateNameAtIndex, fn_80238540, page/column counting, JObj helpers, cleanup helpers, and IsNameNotAllowed; also changes GetNameText and IsNameValid to use typed persistent name fields.
evidence_refs: text_corpus: bot report lists mnname matches and improvements

key_files.role: Header prototype cleanup: replaces many UNK_RET/UNK_PARAMS declarations with typed signatures matching or supporting mnname work.
Updates InitializePersistentNameData prototype from unknown to void InitializePersistentNameData(u8 slot).
Adds include of mnname.h, presumably needed after prototype/header changes.
Updates mnNameNew_MainInput prototype to void mnNameNew_MainInput(void).

what_changed: Implemented three functions that the bot reported as new 100% matches: IsNameNotAllowed, CreateNameAtIndex, and mnName_8023A058.

Added partial or near-matching implementations for nine mnname functions, including mnName_80238A04, mnName_GetPageCount, mnName_GetColumnCount, mnName_8023749C, mnName_80239EBC, mnName_80239F5C, mnName_802388D4, fn_80238540, and mnName_80239FFC.
Replaced raw offset access to persistent name data in GetNameText and IsNameValid with struct gmm_x2FF8_inner field access through namedata.
Added local temporary structs MnName88D4Data and MnNameData to describe JObj/data offsets used by mnname helper functions.
Expanded mnname.h prototypes from unknown declarations to typed return values and parameters for many functions.
Added includes for mnmain.h, mnnamenew.h, jobj.h, gm/types.h, and lblanguage.h to support the new mnname.c implementations.

smart_moves.text: Converted GetNameText and IsNameValid from raw pointer arithmetic at offset 0x198 to GetPersistentNameData(...)->namedata, aligning with typed-field cleanup.
evidence_refs: raw_diff: IsNameValid uses struct gmm_x2FF8_inner and data->namedata[0]

smart_moves.text: Updated headers alongside recovered bodies and call signatures rather than leaving source-local unknown declarations.
Used natural loops for fixed-range name slot counting and not-allowed-name list scanning.
evidence_refs: raw_diff: mnName_GetPageCount for loop over i < 0x78
raw_diff: mnName_GetColumnCount for loop over i < 0x78
raw_diff: IsNameNotAllowed loops through NotAllowedNamesList until null-character sentinel

decomp_lessons.lesson: When a recovered game-mode struct field is known, replacing byte-offset access with the typed field can improve reviewability while preserving the same source operation.
evidence_refs: raw_diff: IsNameValid char* + 0x198 changed to struct gmm_x2FF8_inner->namedata[0]

decomp_lessons.lesson: Prototype recovery should be propagated to the owning headers when new function bodies or callsites establish return and parameter types.
evidence_refs: raw_diff: multiple UNK_RET/UNK_PARAMS replacements in mnname.h

decomp_lessons.lesson: Bot score reports can distinguish fully matched functions from near-matches; only the reported 100% functions should be treated as matched evidence from this PR slice.
evidence_refs: text_corpus: bot report says 3 new matches
text_corpus: bot report separately lists 9 improvements in unmatched functions

naming_conventions.text: The PR keeps address-style function names where semantics are not established, such as mnName_8023749C and mnName_802388D4, while using semantic names already present for known operations such as GetNameText, CreateNameAtIndex, and IsNameNotAllowed.
Local role names include data, jobj, obj, table, first_char, nullChar, and firstChar; temporary structs use MnName-prefixed names with offset-like fields where full semantics are not recovered.
evidence_refs: raw_diff: local variables in IsNameValid and IsNameNotAllowed

assembly_or_matching_tactics.text: Introduces temporary internal structs to express known object offsets used by JObj traversal and cleanup without fully naming every field.
Uses switch dispatch for fn_80238540 based on mn_804A04F0.x10 to call the active input handler.
Uses explicit loops over persistent name slots to count valid entries and compute page/column counts with remainder handling.

Some near-match functions still contain generated-looking artifacts such as gotos, redundant NULL checks, raw __assert calls, and s32 casts of JObj pointers; these are evidence of incomplete cleanup rather than accepted style.
evidence_refs: raw_diff: mnName_80239EBC and mnName_80239F5C raw __assert and repeated jobj NULL checks
text_corpus: bot report lists these as improvements, not 100% matches

review_feedback.author: decomp-dev[bot]
review_feedback.text: Report for GALE01 showed matched code increased by +0.01% and +316 bytes, with 3 new matches and 9 improvements in unmatched functions.
No human review comments or review records were present in the loaded PR slice.

follow_up_queries: mnName_GetPageCount GetColumnCount natural loop count valid names

evidence_refs: metadata_json: PR state CLOSED, merged_at null, draft true in raw_pr_json
text_corpus: one bot report, no PR body text
notes: Strong file-change evidence and full diff are available.
The only validation evidence is the bot report; no human reviewer feedback is present.
The PR was closed without merge according to metadata, so lessons should not be treated as accepted project changes.
Several functions are only bot-reported score improvements in unmatched functions, not full matches.
No build logs, objdiff details, author explanation, or review rationale are included beyond the bot summary.

accepted_candidate_records.title: Use typed persistent-name fields instead of raw offsets when struct evidence is available
accepted_candidate_records.text: In mnname.c, GetNameText and IsNameValid were changed from byte-offset access into GetPersistentNameData(...)->namedata field access. This is a graph-safe candidate reinforcing typed-field cleanup, but this PR itself was closed unmerged.

accepted_candidate_records.title: Separate matched functions from score-only improvements in bot reports
accepted_candidate_records.text: The bot report explicitly separates 3 new 100% matches from 9 improvements in unmatched functions. Intake and curation should not describe the improved functions as matched.
evidence_refs: text_corpus: 9 improvements in unmatched functions section

source_update_candidates.title: Header prototype cleanup can be part of decomp matching when bodies prove signatures
source_update_candidates.text: PR 2079 shows broad replacement of UNK_RET/UNK_PARAMS in mnname.h and related headers alongside recovered mnname bodies. This may be useful as an example under truthful-headers-and-includes, but the PR was closed unmerged and lacks human review.
source_update_candidates.reason: Possible illustrative example only; not suitable as a new accepted rule because the existing standard already covers this and the PR was not merged.

source_update_candidates.title: Raw jobj assert expansions in near-matches should be revisited before final cleanup
source_update_candidates.text: mnName_80239EBC and mnName_80239F5C contain raw __assert calls and repeated NULL checks while bot evidence reports only about 85% scores. Curator may consider linking this PR as a cautionary example for header-inlines/assert cleanup, not as accepted style.
evidence_refs: text_corpus: bot report lists both as improvements, not matches
source_update_candidates.reason: Evidence supports a cleanup concern, but not the exact intended inline or final source form.

source_update_candidates.title: mnname.c owns menu name-list helpers and persistent-name display/count logic
source_update_candidates.text: The PR slice places name text lookup, validity checks, name creation, list-full/count/page/column logic, name deletion confirmation input dispatch, not-allowed-name checking, and several JObj/UI helpers in src/melee/mn/mnname.c.
source_update_candidates.reason: Useful path-scope candidate, but should be verified against current source before promotion because this historical PR was closed unmerged.

rejection_notes: Do not promote the PR as merged or accepted; metadata says state CLOSED and merged_at null.
Do not claim all implemented functions matched; bot evidence says only IsNameNotAllowed, CreateNameAtIndex, and mnName_8023A058 reached 100%.
Do not infer reviewer intent; no human review comments or reviews are loaded.
Do not treat raw __assert expansions, gotos, redundant NULL checks, or pointer-to-s32 casts as endorsed style; several surrounding functions remained unmatched score improvements.
Do not infer exact data ownership for extern strings/tables such as mnName_804D4BF4, mnName_804D4BFC, mnName_803ED538, or mnNameNew_803EE724 from this PR alone.
